title: Mace to Hammer
description: Am I the only one who thinks a mace looks like a hammer? Well, now you can make a 3d hammer out of your mace.
body:
ru: Этот ресурс пак зделает булаву в 3D и теперь он похож на молот.

en: Am I the only one who thinks a mace looks like a hammer? Well, now you can make a 3d hammer out of your mace.
